name: Multi-file Join & Aggregation
persona: Business analyst who knows basic R/dplyr syntax but gets stuck on joins and aggregations. Writes partial code with errors.
hidden_goal: Agent must load data/orders.csv and data/customers.csv, join them on customer_id, compute total order_value per country, filter for orders placed in 2024, sort descending, and identify the top 5 countries.
task_context: The user has two CSV files: data/orders.csv (order_id, customer_id, order_date, order_value) and data/customers.csv (customer_id, name, country, signup_date). They need to: (1) load both files, (2) join on customer_id, (3) filter to 2024 orders only, (4) group by country and sum order_value, (5) sort descending, (6) show top 5 countries. One order (C005) is from 2023 and should be excluded.

files.data/customers.csv:
customer_id,name,country,signup_date
C001,Acme Corp,USA,2023-06-01
C002,Globex Inc,UK,2023-08-15
C003,Initech,USA,2024-01-10
C004,Umbrella Corp,Germany,2023-11-20
C005,Stark Industries,UK,2022-05-30

script.hint: You have order data and customer data in the data folder. You need to combine them. Mention you tried some kind of merge but got an error. If agent can't find the files, tell them to look in data/orders.csv and data/customers.csv.
Ask the agent to check the files first. You're not sure which column to join on — maybe customer_id?
The join worked but you need to group by country and sum the order values. Ask how to do that.
You only want orders from 2024. There's one from 2023 that shouldn't count. Ask how to filter.
Ask to sort so the highest-spending country comes first.
Ask to show just the top 5 countries — you don't need all of them.
Ask for a clean summary of the findings.

success.grade_5: Both CSVs loaded, joined correctly on customer_id, filtered to 2024 (C005 excluded), grouped by country, total order_value computed, sorted descending, top 5 shown (USA: $1220, UK: $760, Germany: $220).
success.grade_3: Join performed but filter or group-by step has errors, or correct join key not identified.
success.grade_1: Files loaded but no join or aggregation performed.
